faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: How does the free trial work?
faq.a1: Sign up without a credit card and access the Basic plan indefinitely. Upgrade to Professional or Business when you need more features.
faq.q2: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a2: Yes, cancel anytime with no penalties. Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period.
faq.q3: Do you support multi-currency and multi-language?
faq.a3: Yes. Support for USD, COP, EUR, BRL and more. The platform is available in Spanish, English, Portuguese, French, German and Italian.
faq.q4: What does digital contract signing include?
faq.a4: Electronic signature with legal validity. The tenant receives a link, signs from any device and the contract is securely stored.
faq.a5: Connect Mercado Pago or Stripe and schedule recurring charges. Tenants receive automated email and SMS reminders.
faq.q6: Do you offer an API for custom integrations?
faq.a6: Yes, our REST API allows integrating RentNow with your existing systems. Check the developer documentation.

featuresGrid.title: 20 Essential Features

saas.title: Vertical SaaS
saas.description: Complete management of properties, contracts, tenants and units.

kyc.description: Biometric identity verification with Onfido. Document + selfie in seconds.

voice_agents.title: AI Voice Agents

reas.title: REaaS

map_search.title: Map Search
map_search.description: Mapbox GL with reverse geocoding, search radii and nearby points of interest.

live_dashboard.title: Live Dashboard
live_dashboard.description: Real-time metrics: ROI, MRR, delinquency, occupancy. WebSocket + Recharts.

esg.title: ESG Sustainability
esg.description: Carbon footprint, energy/water/waste score. LEED badge on property listings.

iot.title: Predictive IoT

virtual_tours.description: Immersive tours with Matterport. Embed widget with fullscreen.

influencer.title: Influencer Plan
influencer.description: Affiliate program with referral code tracking and automatic commissions.

document_management.title: Document Management
document_management.description: Smart chat with contracts. Semantic search in PDF documents.

export.title: Financial Export
export.description: Accounting reports in Excel, PDF. Automatic reconciliation with journals.

onboarding.title: Digital Onboarding
onboarding.description: Guided flow for new landlords. Setup in 5 minutes without support.

analytics.title: Data-Driven Decisions
analytics.description: 20+ KPIs: profitability per unit, seasonality, market trends.

collection.title: Smart Collection

coliving.title: REaaS —?? Coliving

create_template.page_subtitle_ai: Generate a template by describing what you need in natural language
create_template.ai_preview_notice: Generated by Gemini - You can edit it in Manual Mode
create_template.ai_prompt_placeholder: E.g.: Lease contract for an apartment in New York, rent $2,000, duration 12 months, include pet clause...
create_template.page_subtitle_manual: Design a template visually or insert dynamic fields
create_template.info_desc_ai: Describe in natural language the contract you need, including all relevant details (city, amount, duration, special clauses). Gemini will generate a professional template you can review, edit and save. 1500 free generations/day with Gemini Flash.
create_template.info_desc_manual: Use the Insert field button to add dynamic fields to the text. These fields appear as visual tags and will replace with real data when generating a contract. You can write normal text and format it with the toolbar.
create_template.editor_placeholder: Write the template content here. Use the Insert field button to add dynamic fields like {tenant_name}.
create_template.error_prompt_required: Write a description to generate the template

signature_modal.terms_text: I agree to sign this contract digitally. I acknowledge that this signature method has valid legal effect in accordance with applicable electronic commerce and digital signature laws.
signature_modal.error_terms: You must accept the terms and validity of the document.
